title: sideritis incana subsp. virgata
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. virgata, also known as the Virgata Mountain Tea, is a plant species within the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. virgata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, while modern preparations include capsules and essential oils.
